MARKET SUMMARY
The week saw elevated geopolitical activity in the Middle East, particularly surrounding
developments involving Iran. Throughout this period, the UAE has demonstrated strong
leadership and resilience, proactively implementing precautionary measures, safeguarding
stability, and ensuring uninterrupted safety and confidence for residents and businesses
alike.
